templates.body:
POST-JUDGMENT LOG
Judgment date: _______  Amount: $_______  Court: _______________
Debtor status: [ ] operating [ ] BK [ ] dead
Next step owner: counsel  Not legal advice.

WRIT / EXECUTION CHECKLIST
[ ] Writ application prepared by counsel
[ ] Service dates logged
[ ] Asset search results (if any): _______________
Result to date: _______________

COSTS / FEES ROW
Filing: _______________  Date: _______
Taxable costs claimed: $_______  Status: _______________
Attach: certificate of counsel, fee schedule

CLOSURE MEMO (facts)
Judgment: Y/N  Collected: $_______
BK discharge or dead debtor: _______________
Trail complete: Y/N  Archive location: _______________
No outcome guarantee implied.
